name: copilot-cli-backlog
description: Copilot CLI extension for managing a per-session task backlog with a live sidecar viewer.
author: Marcus Markiewicz

scripts.check: node --check .github/extensions/backlog/extension.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/db.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/items.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/doctor.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/sidecar.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/commands.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/prompt.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/join-config.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/store.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/loop-prompt.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/loop-state.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/loop-controller.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/vcs-provider.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/isolation.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/review-channel.mjs && node --check .github/extensions/backlog/backup.mjs && node --check scripts/install-extension-shim.mjs
scripts.test: node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-db-migration.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-id-generation.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-items.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-position-reorder.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-command-parsing.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-doctor.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-sidecar-snapshot.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-sidecar-mutate.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-lock.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-join-config.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-events.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-store.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-loop-state.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-loop-controller.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-vcs-provider.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-isolation.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-review-channel.mjs && node .github/extensions/backlog/tests/test-backup-restore.mjs
